languages.text: {n}Все выглядит так реалистично... но если прислушаться, до вас не долетает гул улья. Даже в разгар войны он должен быть слышен. До чего искусная подделка! Невольно возникает вопрос — не проще было бы проживать эти часы как остальные, в счастливом неведении? Ведь с каждым разом действия становятся все более привычными, отработанными. Словно вы медленно превращаетесь в {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}сервитора{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Все выглядит так реалистично... но если прислушаться, до вас не долетает гул улья. Даже в разгар войны он должен быть слышен. До чего искусная подделка! Невольно возникает вопрос — не проще было бы проживать эти часы как остальные, в счастливом неведении? Ведь с каждым разом действия становятся все более привычными, отработанными. Словно вы медленно превращаетесь в {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}сервитора{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}It all looks so real... but if you listen closely, you cannot hear the thrumming of the hive. Even in the thick of war, it should be audible. Such a masterful reproduction! A question arises unbidden in your mind: would it not be easier to live out these hours in blissful ignorance, just as the others do? After all, with each repetition, your actions would only become more familiar, more practised. As if you were slowly turning into a {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这一切看起来如此真实……但若凝神细听，却听不见巢都那应有的嗡鸣。即便战事正酣，那声音也应当清晰可辨。多么完美的复刻！你脑海中不由自主地浮现一个想法：像旁人那般，在蒙昧的安宁中度过余下的时刻，岂不更加轻松？毕竟，一遍遍重复下来，你的行动只会愈发熟练，愈发得心应手，仿佛你正慢慢变成一台{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}机仆{/g}。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It all looks so real... but if you listen closely, you cannot hear the thrumming of the hive. Even in the thick of war, it should be audible. Such a masterful reproduction! A question arises unbidden in your mind: would it not be easier to live out these hours in blissful ignorance, just as the others do? After all, with each repetition, your actions would only become more familiar, more practised. As if you were slowly turning into a {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}这一切看起来如此真实……但若凝神细听，却听不见巢都那应有的嗡鸣。即便战事正酣，那声音也应当清晰可辨。多么完美的复刻！你脑海中不由自主地浮现一个想法：像旁人那般，在蒙昧的安宁中度过余下的时刻，岂不更加轻松？毕竟，一遍遍重复下来，你的行动只会愈发熟练，愈发得心应手，仿佛你正慢慢变成一台{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}机仆{/g}。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tout a l'air si réel... mais lorsque vous tendez l'oreille, vous ne percevez pas le bourdonnement de la ruche. Pourtant, elle devrait rester audible malgré le fracas des combats. Décidément, l'illusion est presque parfaite ! Une question se fait jour spontanément dans votre esprit : ne serait-il pas plus simple d'attendre que ça passe dans une ignorance béate, comme les autres ? Après tout, à chaque répétition, vos actions deviendraient plus familières, pareilles à un réflexe conditionné, comme si vous vous transformiez lentement en {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It all looks so real... but if you listen closely, you cannot hear the thrumming of the hive. Even in the thick of war, it should be audible. Such a masterful reproduction! A question arises unbidden in your mind: would it not be easier to live out these hours in blissful ignorance, just as the others do? After all, with each repetition, your actions would only become more familiar, more practised. As if you were slowly turning into a {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g}.{/n}

Après tout, à chaque répétition, vos actions deviendraient plus familières, pareilles à un réflexe conditionné, comme si vous vous transformiez lentement en {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Her şey o kadar gerçek görünüyor ki... Ancak dikkatle dinlediğinde kovanın uğultusunu duyamıyorsun. Oysa savaşın en yoğun anında bile duyulabilmeli. Ne kadar ustaca bir kopyalama! Zihnin davetsiz bir soru beliriyor: Bu saatleri tıpkı diğerleri gibi mutlu bir cehalet içinde geçirmek daha kolay olmaz mıydı? Sonuçta her tekrarda eylemlerin sadece daha tanıdık, daha pratik hâle gelecektir. Sanki yavaş yavaş bir {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}hizmetöre{/g} dönüşüyormuşsun gibi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It all looks so real... but if you listen closely, you cannot hear the thrumming of the hive. Even in the thick of war, it should be audible. After all, with each repetition, your actions would only become more familiar, more practised. As if you were slowly turning into a {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g}.{/n}

Ne kadar ustaca bir kopyalama! Zihnin davetsiz bir soru beliriyor: Bu saatleri tıpkı diğerleri gibi mutlu bir cehalet içinde geçirmek daha kolay olmaz mıydı? Sonuçta her tekrarda eylemlerin sadece daha tanıdık, daha pratik hâle gelecektir. Sanki yavaş yavaş bir {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}hizmetöre{/g} dönüşüyormuşsun gibi.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Todo es tan real... pero si escuchas atentamente, no oyes el rumor de la colmena. Incluso en tiempos de guerra, debería seguir siendo audible. ¡Qué réplica más espectacular! Una pregunta aflora espontáneamente en tu mente. ¿No sería más fácil vivir en la feliz ignorancia? Con cada repetición, tus acciones te resultarían más familiares, tendrías más práctica. Sería como convertirte gradualmente en {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servidor{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It all looks so real... but if you listen closely, you cannot hear the thrumming of the hive. Even in the thick of war, it should be audible. Such a masterful reproduction! A question arises unbidden in your mind: would it not be easier to live out these hours in blissful ignorance, just as the others do? After all, with each repetition, your actions would only become more familiar, more practised. As if you were slowly turning into a {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g}.{/n}

Una pregunta aflora espontáneamente en tu mente. ¿No sería más fácil vivir en la feliz ignorancia? Con cada repetición, tus acciones te resultarían más familiares, tendrías más práctica. Sería como convertirte gradualmente en {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servidor{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Alles sieht so real aus ... aber selbst wenn du dich anstrengst, kannst du das Dröhnen der Makropole nicht hören. Dabei müsste es selbst den Krieg übertönen. Eine wirklich meisterhafte Reproduktion! Eine Frage drängt sich dir auf: Wäre es nicht einfacher, diese Stunden wie die anderen in glückseliger Unwissenheit verstreichen zu lassen? Immerhin wären deine Aktionen nach jeder Wiederholung vertrauter und routinierter. Als würdest du dich langsam in einen {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}Servitor{/g} verwandeln.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It all looks so real... but if you listen closely, you cannot hear the thrumming of the hive. Even in the thick of war, it should be audible. Such a masterful reproduction! A question arises unbidden in your mind: would it not be easier to live out these hours in blissful ignorance, just as the others do? After all, with each repetition, your actions would only become more familiar, more practised. As if you were slowly turning into a {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}まるで本物のように見える... でもよく耳を澄ますと、蜂の巣のざわめきが聞こえない。戦争の最中であっても、聞こえるはずだ。こんな完璧な再現！疑問が湧いてくる。他の者と同じように、この時間を至福の無知の中で過ごすほうが楽ではないだろうか？繰り返すたびに、行動はより馴染み、より熟練したものになるだろう。まるで、ゆっくりと{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}サービトール{/g}へと変貌しつつあるかのようだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It all looks so real... but if you listen closely, you cannot hear the thrumming of the hive. Even in the thick of war, it should be audible.
